title: Meta Social Asset
description: Platform-independent social publishing asset produced by module 11 (daily) or module 10-intraday (story). Carries the shared AI output plus per-platform formatted payloads ready for the Meta publish step. Passed to module 12 (daily) or the intraday story delivery module.

topic_slug.description: Topic slug. Matches the topic the content was generated for.

asset_type.description: Whether this is a feed-style daily post or a story-style asset.

source_type.description: What source triggered this asset: a completed daily summary or a high-priority intraday alert.

source_id.description: For alert-sourced assets: the item_id of the originating alert. For daily_summary assets: null or 'daily'.

publish_job_id.description: D1 publish_jobs row ID for daily_summary-sourced assets. Null for alert-sourced assets.

ai_output.description: Raw validated AI output from the meta_social_post schema.

enabled.description: Whether Instagram publishing is enabled for this asset.

caption.description: Instagram-formatted caption. Truncated to 2200 characters with hashtags appended. Derived from ai_output.post_caption.

story_caption.description: Instagram story caption. Null when stories are disabled or not supported for this asset_type.

story_enabled.description: Whether Instagram story publishing is enabled for this asset.

enabled.description: Whether Facebook publishing is enabled for this asset.

caption.description: Facebook-formatted caption. Hashtags appended. May be slightly longer than Instagram caption. Derived from ai_output.post_caption.

story_caption.description: Facebook story caption. Null when stories are disabled or not supported for this asset_type.

story_enabled.description: Whether Facebook story publishing is enabled for this asset.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this asset was generated.

ai_output.post_caption: Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates.
ai_output.image_prompt: Professional financial chart with Bitcoin price rally
ai_output.story_background_hint: Dark gradient with orange Bitcoin symbol
ai_output.cta: Full daily crypto briefing — link in bio.

instagram.caption:
Bitcoin ETF inflows hit a record $500M in a single session as institutional demand accelerates.

Full daily crypto briefing — link in bio.

#crypto #bitcoin #BTC #ETF

facebook.caption:
